title: Fit test - Failing the fit test
scenario: Verify fit test failure handling on Voyager Free earbuds, including retry and cancel actions with correct fail/good tags, icons, messages, and navigation.
steps: Open the Poly Lens app on a paired device with Voyager Free 60/60+ or Voyager Free 20 earbuds.
Navigate to the fit test feature.
Run the fit test with one earbud not properly seated in the ear.
Observe the result for the improperly seated earbud.
Run the fit test with both earbuds not properly seated in the ear.
Observe the result for both earbuds.
Tap the retry button on the fit test failure screen.
Run the fit test again with proper earbud seating.
Run the fit test with one earbud failing, then tap the cancel/back button.
expected:
- When one earbud fails: appropriate fail tag/icon/message for that earbud, good tag/icon/message for the other earbud.
- When both earbuds fail: fail tags/icons/messages for both earbuds.
- After retry with proper seating: all earbuds show good tags/icons/messages.
- After cancel: user navigates back to the previous screen without saving or applying changes.
